title: Zenodo DOI + WorkflowHub entry + release freeze
context: A citable FAIR release: a tagged release minted with a Zenodo DOI plus a WorkflowHub entry, with an audit ensuring no restricted-source bytes are included (PLAN §8 M3). Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Mint a tagged release with a Zenodo DOI and a WorkflowHub entry, with checksummed artifacts and a restricted-source audit.
acceptanceCriteria: A tagged release is minted with a Zenodo DOI; a WorkflowHub entry is created; artifacts are checksummed.
No restricted-source bytes are in the release (audit passes).
Release notes link provenance manifests and citations.
output: A pull request adding the release freeze (Zenodo DOI + WorkflowHub entry + checksummed artifacts).
